pi_items.source: Task description implicitly calls for using Bonsai to create and contain IfcGeographicElement and IfcPlant meshes.
The tags explicitly match the nature of the BIM authoring task.
Task description explicitly states 'You are a Landscape Architect'.
Task operates on an IFC architectural model in Bonsai.
Task description states 'Create a large mesh... to represent the terrain surface'. I also confirmed the base model AC20-FZK-Haus.ifc has 0 existing IfcGeographicElements.
Task description states 'Create at least 5 distinct mesh objects'. I also confirmed the base model AC20-FZK-Haus.ifc has 0 existing IfcPlants.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly enforce this path.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task utilizes the real-world 'AC20-FZK-Haus.ifc' model from ifcwiki.org. Verified that the expected 1 geographic element (terrain), 5 plant elements, and output file path directly match the task description instructions and base model contents. However, discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
